content: TASK-038 interrupt done: component/area expansion lock is available in <archmap-viewer>, index.html, and examples/demo.html. RenderOptions/RenderResult now expose abstractionLocked and setAbstractionLocked/isAbstractionLocked; locked state blocks click expansion/collapse and suppresses hover affordance. Next: continue TASK-009/TASK-010 acceptance work; consider 3D full icon-grid parity and subgraph overlay parity in 3D if the human asks. Keep TASK-011 QIF audit active and run full pattern verification only for routing/overlay/verifier changes or periodic audit.
